title: Plutarch, Moralia: Whether Vice is Sufficient to Cause Unhappiness
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether Vice is Sufficient to Cause Unhappiness.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether Vice is Sufficient to Cause Unhappiness.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Whether Vice is Sufficient to Cause Unhappiness': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
